30	def build_parser() -> argparse.ArgumentParser:
31	    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description='Python porting workspace for the Claude Code rewrite effort')
32	    subparsers = parser.add_subparsers(dest='command', required=True)
33	    subparsers.add_parser('summary', help='render a Markdown summary of the Python porting workspace')
34	    subparsers.add_parser('manifest', help='print the current Python workspace manifest')
35	    subparsers.add_parser('parity-audit', help='compare the Python workspace against the local ignored TypeScript archive when available')

37	    subparsers.add_parser('command-graph', help='show command graph segmentation')
38	    subparsers.add_parser('tool-pool', help='show assembled tool pool with default settings')

41	    list_parser.add_argument('--limit', type=int, default=32)
42

162	def resolve_chat_prompt(args: argparse.Namespace, parser: argparse.ArgumentParser) -> str:
163	    if args.prompt:
164	        return args.prompt
165	    prompt = sys.stdin.read().strip()
166	    if prompt:
167	        return prompt
168	    command_name = getattr(args, 'command', 'command')
169	    parser.error(f'{command_name} requires a prompt argument or stdin input')
170	    raise AssertionError('unreachable')
171	
172	
173	def main(argv: list[str] | None = None) -> int:
174	    parser = build_parser()
175	    args = parser.parse_args(argv)
176	    manifest = build_port_manifest()
177	    if args.command == 'summary':
178	        print(QueryEnginePort(manifest).render_summary())
179	        return 0
180	    if args.command == 'manifest':
181	        print(manifest.to_markdown())
182	        return 0
183	    if args.command == 'parity-audit':
184	        print(run_parity_audit().to_markdown())
185	        return 0
186	    if args.command == 'setup-report':
187	        print(run_setup().as_markdown())
188	        return 0
189	    if args.command == 'command-graph':
190	        print(build_command_graph().as_markdown())
191	        return 0
192	    if args.command == 'tool-pool':
193	        print(assemble_tool_pool().as_markdown())
194	        return 0
195	    if args.command == 'bootstrap-graph':
196	        print(build_bootstrap_graph().as_markdown())
197	        return 0
198	    if args.command == 'subsystems':
199	        for subsystem in manifest.top_level_modules[: args.limit]:
200	            print(f'{subsystem.name}\t{subsystem.file_count}\t{subsystem.notes}')
201	        return 0
202	    if args.command == 'commands':
203	        if args.query:
204	            print(render_command_index(limit=args.limit, query=args.query))
205	        else:
206	            commands = get_commands(include_plugin_commands=not args.no_plugin_commands, include_skill_commands=not args.no_skill_commands)
207	            output_lines = [f'Command entries: {len(commands)}', '']
208	            output_lines.extend(f'- {module.name} — {module.source_hint}' for module in commands[: args.limit])
209	            print('\n'.join(output_lines))
210	        return 0
